name: OKB
analysis: OKB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 56% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $76.4626, stop $70.6140, target $84.1590 (1.32:1) — then trail it.
